fact_nuggets.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Wildbolt Storm inflicts damage and has a 30% chance of paralyzing the target. Pokemon Legends: Arceus Category Special PP 5 Agile Strong Power 95 75 115 Accuracy 80% 80% 90% Action speed modifier Self 0 0 +5 Target 0 +3 0 Additional effect Chance 30% 30% 50% Turns 3 2 4 ? ? Inflicts the target with paralysis Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Wildbolt Storm's PP and power were changed to 10 and 100, respectively. It now has a 20% chance of paralyzing each target. In a battle with multiple opponents, Wildbolt Storm will target all adjacent opponents. When used during rain , Wildbolt Storm bypasses accuracy checks to always hit, unless the target is in the semi-invulnerable turn of a move such as Dig or Fly . Wildbolt Storm is a wind move .
